title: Full-Stack Focus - Scalable Web Application
description:
• Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for CRUD operations.
• Tested and validated APIs using Postman.
• Followed MVC architecture for clean and scalable code structure.
• Integrated backend with database for persistent data storage.
• Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based authorization.
• Backend logic transferable to Python-based frameworks.

title: CloudPoint - APIs based Weather Application
description: A weather application that provides real-time weather updates and forecasts using various weather APIs.
